description: Post-earnings drift exhaustion / mean-rev scanner. 4-factor: earnings 5-15td ago + RSI<=25 or >=75 + price ext >=1.5 std vs 50dMA + IV crushed <=50 percentile. Counter-trend LONG/SHORT tickets 5-10d hold. Bernard-Thomas 1989, Chordia-Shivakumar 2006, Bali 2008. ~58% hit / +2-4%. Daily 00 UTC.
